category_sources: source_facts.description says Dante is a SOCKS server and client implementing RFC 1928; official Dante homepage describes network connectivity and SOCKS proxy use.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dante; official homepage title and documentation use Dante.
docs_sources: Official Dante documentation page contains guides, configuration documentation, manual pages, and module documentation for version 1.4.x.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Dante homepage and documentation provide source/download information but no official public source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says SOCKS server and client implementing RFC 1928.
source_facts.executables lists sockd and socksify; current_curation.tags includes cli.
